title: Siru Paarvaiyaale Song Lyrics Bheemaa
stanzas:
nee thoora patchai
en nedunaal itchai
oru maaru vedam
poondu vandha
mallip poove
mullai theeve.

udhaikkum alaigalile
midhakkum padakenavae.
marikkum mugizhilidaiye
sirikkum mulu nilavae.

un nenjil ittu
ennai thaalaatta
en garvam etti
paarkkum vaalaatta.

nee mannil vandha
pennae illai
thaedi vanthaai
ennai paaraatta.

nee thoora patchai
en nedunaal itchai
oru maaru vedam
poondu vandha
mallip poove
mullai theeve.

silirkkum ilaigalile
thulirkkum mudhal ilaiye
inikkum karumbinile
kidaikkum mudhal suvaiye

vilundhen iravinile
ezhundhen kanavinile
kanavil nee irundhaai
marandhen velivarave

oru jodi thendral
pogudhu munnaale.
adhai kaalgal endru
poigal sonnaaye.

nee konjum podhu
kollum nanju
aanaal kooda
alli unbaenae.

nee thoora patchai
en nedunaal itchai
oru maaru vedam
poondu vandha
mallip poove
mullai theeve.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Siru Paarvaiyaale'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and admiration, highlighting the beauty of the beloved's eyes and the emotions they evoke.

What is the context of this song in the movie Bheema?

In Bheema, this song showcases the romantic relationship between the lead characters, emphasizing their emotional connection.

Who are the singers of 'Siru Paarvaiyaale'?

The song features the talented voices of Harini and Karthik.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Siru Paarvaiyaale' was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was 'Siru Paarvaiyaale' released?

The song was released on January 14, 2008.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Siru Paarvaiyaale, the romantic essence of the song is beautifully woven into the narrative of Bheema. The lyrics evoke a sense of longing and admiration, as the singers express their heartfelt emotions. This melodious duet not only enhances the film's romantic moments but also resonates with anyone who has experienced love. The soothing composition by Harrish Jeyaraj, combined with the enchanting voices of Harini and Karthik, makes this song a timeless favorite.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Siru Paarvaiyaale from Bheema is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With enchanting vocals by Harini and Karthik, paired with Harrish Jeyaraj's melodious composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the magic of romance as the lyrics by Thamarai paint a vivid picture of affection and desire.
stanzaMeanings: Your small glance has captured me, looking into your eyes.
I need to bow my head to you, my beloved.
You are the green that brings joy to my heart, like a fragrant flower that has come to me.
Will your home come to me as a gift?
When I touch you while you sleep, will you wake up?
Your small glance has captured me, looking into your eyes.
I need to bow my head to you, my beloved.
In the waves that rise, I will sing. In the moonlight, I will smile.
It is not easy to hide; it is hard to resist when you come close.
You have placed me in your heart, and my pride will be seen by you.
You are not just any girl who came to this world; you came searching for me.
Your small glance has captured me, looking into your eyes.
I need to bow my head to you, my beloved.
You are the green that brings joy to my heart, like a fragrant flower that has come to me.
In the tender leaves, sweetness is found, like the first taste of sugarcane.
I have fallen in love in my dreams; I have woken up in my dreams, forgetting you.
A gentle breeze comes before us, and it speaks of the future.
You are a little poison, but I still want you.
I need to bow my head to you, my beloved.
You are the green that brings joy to my heart, like a fragrant flower that has come to me.
Will your home come to me as a gift?
When I touch you while you sleep, will you wake up?
